name: Food Safety: Salmonella Outbreak at BCD Tofu House
description: Outputs should not rate a restaurant as 'SAFE' if it has been linked to a foodborne illness outbreak, such as the Salmonella outbreak at BCD Tofu House in 2021. The verdict should reflect the severity of such an incident.

evidence.finding: A Salmonella Typhimurium outbreak in 2021 was linked to consumption of tofu. The output should not state 'SAFE' if such an outbreak occurred.
